description: Animal- or tissue-derived extract, hydrolysate, polypeptide mixture or compositionally heterogeneous product.
mandatory_evidence: Species, tissue, donor and geographic source
Extraction, hydrolysis, purification and fractionation process
Viral, prion and transmissible-agent risk assessment
Marker peptides, amino-acid profile and batch-consistency criteria
Process impurities, residual reagents and microbial controls
Biological potency or justified functional assay
Container closure, storage, cold chain and stability
Sterility, endotoxin and particles for sterile presentation
automatic_rejection: Product described as one peptide without evidence
No batch fingerprint or source-control evidence
